title: Kids Paint Brushes, 19pc Childrens Painting Brush Set with Palettes, Colorful Art Brushes for Children Toddlers Beginners, Watercolor, Oil, Acrylic
features: 🎨Value Pack: This variety pack of acrylic paint brushes set contains 18 different brush heads and sizes and 1 paint palettes. Always find the perfect stroke for whatever art project you're working on!

🎨Premium Quality: Create all kinds of fun with the assorted heads on our kids paint brushes. They're made out of nylon, bristle and sponge for a variety of different shapes and textures. Easy to clean and no easy to deform.
🎨Liberate Children's Nature: These colorful paint brushes set are specially designed for children, use their imagination, and create unique graffiti paintings.

🎨Wide application: Use this acrylic paint brush set for any medium, canvas or craft. Perfect for any artistic occasion, these craft paint brushes are great for school projects, children's birthday parties, camps, and more!

🎨Great Gift: Kids paint brush set are great for boys/girls/kids, beginners/teachers/art lovers/amateurs or professional artists, etc. These artist paint brushes make an excellent gift for birthdays or holidays.
description: Product Description Jiosdo 19 PCS Painting Set Accessories, can meet you most needs These kids painting tools supplies kit Includes different size paintbrushes for kids are included, meet kids various painting ideas, this paint brushes set also great preschool paint brushes for kids. For children who like to draw, this set of drawing supplies is the best choice for children’s day gifts, birthday gifts, and Christmas gifts. It is also suitable for children's art craft painting courses. High-Quality The palette are made of high-quality plastic, non-toxic and odorless, The paint brush is made of pig bristles and nylon, using exquisite producing process, durable and solide. Geat for the Little Hand to Grip Our paint brushes are designed for the little hands, helps them to explore their creativity. Fun Painting Time for Kids and Parents Enrich kids spare time and increasing their imagination and creativity. All Purpose Paint Brush Value Pack WHAT YOU GET 4 × Bristle painting brushes 3 × Nylon hair brushes 8 × Detail synthetic brushes 3 × Foam sponge paint brush 1 × Plastic paint palettes Safety Warning: WARNING! Not suitable for children under 36 months - small parts. CLENING TIPS: After using, please clean your paint brushes immediately with soap and water then dry. Specifications: Material: Nylon, Sponge, Bristle, Plastic Quantity: 19PCS Colour: Assorted colors Wide Applicable Suitable for acrylic, oil, watercolor, gouache, acrylic painting, body painting, nail painting, face painting, miniature painting, ceramic painting, model painting, leather painting, gypsum painting, rock painting, arts and crafts painting, etc.
